esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-tomcat.otel-*
| WHERE Catalina_ThreadPool_currentThreadsBusy IS NOT NULL
    AND Catalina_ThreadPool_maxThreads IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    busy = MAX(Catalina_ThreadPool_currentThreadsBusy),
    max_threads = MAX(Catalina_ThreadPool_maxThreads)
  BY host.name, attributes.name
| WHERE max_threads > 0
| EVAL utilization_pct = ROUND(busy / max_threads * 100.0, 2)
// Thread pool saturation threshold — adjust based on your capacity requirements
// Above 80% the risk of request queuing and rejection increases rapidly
| WHERE utilization_pct > 80.0
| SORT utilization_pct DESC
